creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #21)

The ports with the most skipped commits have now been fixed:

x11/libwacom : 1489 skipped
math/R : 382 skipped
lang/erlang : 149 skipped
www/node : 85 skipped

in addition, I fixed all the openjdk's in bug 258954.

If time permits we can do yet another run, or maybe I can just go on and merge clang 13 into -CURRENT now?  :)
